title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
